characters.name: Aquaria
characters.description: AquariaCharacter InformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesAtlanteanOccupationQueen ofAtlantisAffiliationsAtlantisMaritalWidowedRelativesAquarus†(husband)EnemiesOmni-ManHomeAtlantisStatusAliveBackground InformationVoiceTatiana Maslany QueenAquariais a minor character inInvincible. She was the wife and Queen ofGuardians of the Globemember KingAquarus. Aquaria, as all other Atlanteans, appears as an anthropomorphic fish, sporting fins growing out from her back and arms. Her skin color is a predominant shade of light blue. She wears a darker blue dress and golden tiara with a purple gem in the center.

characters.name: Barnett
characters.description: BarnettCharacter InformationFull NameBarnettOther NamesDistrict AttorneyGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanOccupationLawyerStatusAliveBackground InformationVoicePatrice Covington Barnettis a minor character inInvincible, debuting inSeason 3's flashbacks. She isChicago's district attorney that was sought out byScott Duvallin his attempts to get an investigation and trial started againstInvinciblefollowing the deaths of hissisterandniecein theDestruction of Chicago. However, Barnett sadly dismissed Scott's pleas.
